title: MikroTik DQ+BC0003-DS+, QSFP56 200G to 4x SFP56 50G DAC cable
description: The MikroTik DQ+BC0003-DS+ is a break-out cable that splits (1) QSFP56 200Gbps interface into (4) independent SFP56 50Gbps interfaces. The cable is 3 meters long, which is an ideal length to reach all the necessary locations while keeping your server room neat and organized
specsSearch: Optics Format QSFP56 to (4) SFP56 Transmission speed 50 Gbps, 200 Gbps AOC/DAC cable type Passive
